hero.headline: The painter Toledo trusts with their *historic homes*
hero.subheadline: Ken and his crew show up on time, finish when promised, and paint your mailbox for free.

services_section.label: THE WORK
services_section.heading: Painting & repairs that last
services_section.subheading: From power washing to historic home restoration — we handle it all

services.title: Exterior Painting
services.description: Complete house painting including gutters, trim, and siding. We prep everything properly so the paint actually sticks.

services.title: Interior Painting
services.description: Clean, careful interior work. Drop cloths stay down, trim gets taped, and we clean up completely.

services.title: Power Washing
services.description: Deep cleaning before we paint. Gets the dirt and old paint off so the new coat bonds properly.

services.title: Home Repairs
services.description: Fix what's broken before we paint it. Siding repairs, trim work, and small carpentry projects.

about.heading: Ken Stout knows Toledo homes
about.body: Local contractor who takes pride in doing the job right the first time. Real crew, real trucks, real results.

reviews.name: Stephanie T.
reviews.text: Ken and his team were amazing to work with. Fast, professional, and made sure all tasks were completed correctly. Highly recommend!

reviews.name: Chris J.
reviews.text: Power washed and painted our entire exterior, including gutters and trim. Even painted our mailbox at no extra cost. Couldn't be happier.

reviews.name: Christine N.
reviews.text: Recently completed work on my historic home — not an easy job. Ken is honest, professional, and does top notch work.

service_areas.label: COVERAGE AREA
service_areas.heading: Serving Toledo & surrounding areas
service_areas.subheading: Local team covering Lucas County and beyond

cta.heading: Ready to get started?
cta.body: Call Ken directly for a free estimate. No pressure, just honest pricing and straight answers about your project.
